literature_sources.mechanism: Match source router distributions through a second-order KL proxy with softmax Hessian and hidden-state covariance.
literature_sources.title: When Model Merging Breaks Routing: Training-Free Calibration for MoE

literature_sources.mechanism: Activation covariance turns weight averaging into a layer-local least-squares merge; HARC applies the same statistics-aware logic to MoE routers.
literature_sources.title: RegMean: A Simple and Effective Method for Model Merging

literature_sources.mechanism: Average candidates need connectivity and barrier checks; low router margin means linear interpolation can cross top-k assignment boundaries.
literature_sources.title: Loss Surfaces, Mode Connectivity, and Fast Ensembling of DNNs

solver_inputs.matrix_free_matvec: sum_i E_x [x x^T dW^T H_i] without materializing kron(H_i, xx^T)
solver_inputs.objective: min_Wm sum_i E_x KL(softmax(W_i x) || softmax(W_m x))
solver_inputs.quadratic_proxy: 0.5 * (W_m x - W_i x)^T (diag(r_i)-r_i r_i^T) (W_m x - W_i x)
solver_inputs.same_shape_constraint: solve only for existing router weight tensors; checkpoint architecture and tensor shapes stay unchanged
